languages.text: "Мы — жители улья, от самых высоких шпилей до самых нижних уровней. Среди Детей Искупления вы найдете любого рода умельцев: и актеров, и медиков, и солдат, и работников мануфакторумов... Большинство выживших находятся за надежными дверями жилых и рабочих отсеков убежища".

traits.locale_text: "Мы — жители улья, от самых высоких шпилей до самых нижних уровней. Среди Детей Искупления вы найдете любого рода умельцев: и актеров, и медиков, и солдат, и работников мануфакторумов... Большинство выживших находятся за надежными дверями жилых и рабочих отсеков убежища".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "We are the denizens of the hive, from its tallest spires to the very lowest maintenance tunnels. You will find all kinds of skilled people among Children of Redemption: actors and medics, solders and manufactory workers... Most of the survivors huddle behind the secure doors of the shelter's workshops and living quarters."
languages.original_text: "Мы — жители улья, от самых высоких шпилей до самых нижних уровней. Среди Детей Искупления вы найдете любого рода умельцев: и актеров, и медиков, и солдат, и работников мануфакторумов... Большинство выживших находятся за надежными дверями жилых и рабочих отсеков убежища".

languages.text: "Wir sind die Bewohner des Bienenstocks, von den höchsten Türmen bis hin zu den niedrigsten Wartungstunneln. Unter den Kindern der Erlösung findet man alle Arten von Fachleuten: Schauspieler und Mediziner, Soldaten und Fabrikarbeiter... Die meisten der Überlebenden halten sich hinter den sicheren Türen der Werkstätten und Wohnräume des Bunkers auf."
languages.original_text: "We are the denizens of the hive, from its tallest spires to the very lowest maintenance tunnels. You will find all kinds of skilled people among Children of Redemption: actors and medics, solders and manufactory workers... Most of the survivors huddle behind the secure doors of the shelter's workshops and living quarters."

languages.text: "Nous sommes les habitants de la ruche, depuis ses plus hautes tours jusqu'aux tunnels de maintenance les plus bas. Vous trouverez toutes sortes de personnes qualifiées parmi les Enfants de la Rédemption : des acteurs et des médecins, des soldats et des ouvriers... La plupart des survivants se blottissent derrière les portes sécurisées des ateliers et des quartiers d'habitation de l'abri".
languages.original_text: "We are the denizens of the hive, from its tallest spires to the very lowest maintenance tunnels. You will find all kinds of skilled people among Children of Redemption: actors and medics, solders and manufactory workers... Most of the survivors huddle behind the secure doors of the shelter's workshops and living quarters."

languages.text: "我们是蜂巢的居民，从最高的尖塔到最底层的维修隧道。在救赎之子中，你会发现各种有技能的人：演员和医护人员、士兵和工厂工人......"大多数幸存者都躲在避难所的车间和生活区的安全门后面"
languages.original_text: "We are the denizens of the hive, from its tallest spires to the very lowest maintenance tunnels. You will find all kinds of skilled people among Children of Redemption: actors and medics, solders and manufactory workers... Most of the survivors huddle behind the secure doors of the shelter's workshops and living quarters."

languages.text: "Somos los habitantes de la colmena, desde sus torres más altas hasta los túneles de mantenimiento más bajos. Entre los Hijos de la Redención encontrarás todo tipo de personas cualificadas: actores y médicos, soldados y trabajadores de fábricas... La mayoría de los supervivientes se apiñan tras las puertas seguras de los talleres y viviendas del refugio".
languages.original_text: "We are the denizens of the hive, from its tallest spires to the very lowest maintenance tunnels. You will find all kinds of skilled people among Children of Redemption: actors and medics, solders and manufactory workers... Most of the survivors huddle behind the secure doors of the shelter's workshops and living quarters."

languages.text: 「私たちは巣の住人であり、巣の最も高い尖塔から最も低い保守用トンネルに至るまで、私たちは巣の住人である。贖罪の子供たちの中には、俳優、医療従事者、兵士、工場労働者など、あらゆる種類の熟練者がいる。生存者のほとんどは、シェルターの作業場や居住区の安全なドアの後ろに身を寄せている。
languages.original_text: "We are the denizens of the hive, from its tallest spires to the very lowest maintenance tunnels. You will find all kinds of skilled people among Children of Redemption: actors and medics, solders and manufactory workers... Most of the survivors huddle behind the secure doors of the shelter's workshops and living quarters."

languages.text: "Bizler, en yüksek kulelerinden en alçak bakım tünellerine kadar kovanın sakinleriyiz. Kefaretin Çocukları arasında her türden yetenekli insan bulacaksınız: aktörler ve sağlık görevlileri, askerler ve imalat işçileri... Hayatta kalanların çoğu sığınağın atölyelerinin ve yaşam alanlarının güvenli kapılarının ardında toplanıyor."
languages.original_text: "We are the denizens of the hive, from its tallest spires to the very lowest maintenance tunnels. You will find all kinds of skilled people among Children of Redemption: actors and medics, solders and manufactory workers... Most of the survivors huddle behind the secure doors of the shelter's workshops and living quarters."
